qa_pairs.question: Which Soccer activities involve students with the last name Kumar who are at least 600 in major and at most 20 years old?

JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN student ON participates_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Soccer' AND student.lname = 'Kumar' AND student.major >= 600 AND student.age <= 20
